description_long: This house features a light-colored exterior with large, multi-pane windows and elegant architectural details such as columns and balustrades. The structure includes two prominent stories, with a spacious balcony and a covered entryway supported by columns. The rear of the house showcases a bay window and a terrace with potted plants, while the front is defined by a grand set of windows and a formal dining area visible inside. The roof is mostly flat with some parapet walls, and the window arrangement is both symmetrical and accentuated by decorative trim. The house blends classical and modern elements, with a focus on open, airy spaces and outdoor living. The entryway is marked by an arched opening and a small porch area.
description: A two-story house with a light facade, large windows, classical columns, balconies, and a flat roof, blending modern and traditional design elements.
description_view_0: This view highlights the side of the house with a balcony, potted plants, and a partially visible arched entryway beneath the terrace.
description_view_1: The back view shows a large set of windows revealing a formal dining area, with a smaller window above and a glimpse of the upper balcony.
description_view_2: The front view features a bay window, two-story columns, and a terrace with balustrades, emphasizing the house's classical details.
description_view_3: This side view displays the arched entryway, balcony with plants, and a mix of window sizes, providing a sense of the house's depth and outdoor spaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with bay windows and large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Arched entryway with a small porch, classical columns, and decorative balustrades
